title: Time Set Reminders
excerpt:
Of all the important requirements of a Task Management app, why does Monday not have alert reminders for individual tasks set with a time specified? 
The only option is to have an automated date/time reminder that is a b…

posts.author: JasonJ (Jason Carter)
posts.cookedHtml:
Of all the important requirements of a Task Management app, why does Monday not have alert reminders for individual tasks set with a time specified?
The only option is to have an automated date/time reminder that is a broad reminder for anything at a certain time specified, ridiculous!

posts.author: mw01 (MW)
posts.cookedHtml: In agreement here. Was just looking for the same thing and can’t seem to find anything.

posts.author: jasonblairlewis (Jason Lewis)
posts.cookedHtml: so crazy how this is not a feature

posts.author: Dana (Dana Halperin Hoffen)
posts.cookedHtml:
You can set up reminders based on the item’s specific time, using the Time Based Automations & Reminders app!

With this app you can set up automations and reminders based on the specific time of any item in your board!

We’re constantly striving to improve and learn, so I’d really appreciate your feedback after using the app and any suggestions on how we can make the user experience even better!
